rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Systemd Loading a Linux Kernel Module Using insmod

rules.rule_text:
title: Systemd Loading a Linux Kernel Module Using insmod
id: 6ec5eab7-03aa-4a6b-8562-012f3ddd2c64
status: experimental
description: "Detects the systemd process running commands that would load a Linux\
  \ Kernel Modules. Part \nof the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/kernel-modules-and-extensions/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1547
- attack.t1547.006
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: /systemd
    Image|endswith: /insmod
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
